skills.name: Concentrated Shot
skills.description: Focus your mind and shoot an arrow at the target in front of you.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time 0.8 seconds (Fixed)
Obtain @st66_y 22B14C[Charge Arrow] when accurately hit
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2
Number of Target 1

skills.name: Dodging Shot
skills.description: Move quickly in the direction you specify to attack the target. If the target is not in range, or if there is no target, move backward.
skills.effect_text:
Use to obtain @st66_y 22B14C[Charge Arrow]
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Number of target 1

skills.name: Angelic Bow
skills.description: Shoots an arrow that rains down from the sky over a designated area, with a chance to {#339999}{ol}[Stun] over time.
skills.effect_text:
Obtain @st66_y 22B14C[Charge Arrow] by CaptionRatio % chance when accurately hit
Apply [Stun] by CaptionRatio2 % when accurately hit
Duration CaptionTime second(s)
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 3
Number of targets 10

skills.name: Scatter Shot
skills.description: Consume all of your {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Charge Arrow], firing shots that scatter over a short distance equal to the number of buffs consumed

skills.name: Blasting Shot
skills.description: Consume all of your {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Charge Arrow] to fire a shot that makes an explosion in a close range.

skills.name: Angelic Arrow
skills.description: Consume all of your {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Charge Arrow] to fire a powerful, penetrating arrow.

attributes.name: [Arts] Rapid Fire
attributes.description:
* All Godeye skill cooldown is drastically reduced but SP Consumption increases by 100%.

* Can only be changed in towns.

attributes.name: Concentrated Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Concentrated Shot: Piercing Shot
attributes.description: * Skill Factor is halved but obtains penetration effect.

attributes.name: Dodging Shot: Speedy
attributes.description: * Does not fire arrows but movement range drastically increased.

attributes.name: [Arts] Scatter Shot: Explosive
attributes.description:
* Attach an Explosive that lasts for 20 seconds on the target hit. (Does not apply to the target already with the Explosive)

* The Explosive is triggered when [Angelic Arrow] is accurately hit.

* Scatter Shot Skill Factor x 9

attributes.name: Blasting Shot: Control Recoil
attributes.description: * No longer knocked back after casting Blasting Shot.

attributes.name: [Arts] Angelic Arrow: Swift
attributes.description:
* Casting Time is {#ff0000}fixed{/} to 1.2 seconds and Skill Factor decreases by 25%.

* Can only be changed in towns.
